Example Domain

Example Domain is used for illustrative examples in documents and demonstrations. The domain appears in sample material when writers need a stable website that does not represent a real company or private resource.

This fixture contains enough ordinary article text to exercise extraction and claim matching. It describes how Example Domain can be used in examples, documentation, test suites, tutorials, teaching material, and product demonstrations without implying that the source is a production service. Reviewers can inspect the extracted Markdown and plain text and see the title, paragraphs, content hashes, and receipt metadata.

The evidence proxy should treat this page as readable source material. It should not mark it as blocked, empty, gated, or JavaScript-only because the body has meaningful text and no anti-bot language. The supported sample claim is intentionally repeated: Example Domain is used for illustrative examples.
